title: Counter-Terror Analysis — 13-page counter-terror analytical narrative arc
public_claim: A counterterrorism and counterintelligence analytical arc, not a collection of detached topic pages.
distinctive_mechanism: The thirteen pages move through definition, radicalization pathway, institutional setting, adversary intelligence, planning cycle, capability conversion, vulnerability interruption, trust-capture disruption, deception defense, instructional diffusion, training interdiction, sustainment interdiction, target-confidence disruption, organizational structure, network concealment, civil-liberties lane discipline, defensive retrieval, intervention logic, and effectiveness review.
